areas.currentStatus: ApiKey authentication and fallback policy exist with P5-03 authentication-boundary foundation (options, principal context, validator abstraction). Development compatibility remains available.
areas.risk: Authentication boundary is in place, but route authorization and tenant-scoped enforcement are not rolled out yet.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-04/P5-08: wire authorization policies and add tenant isolation regression coverage.

areas.currentStatus: Broad policy-based route authorization remains staged; P5-09 introduces a controlled pilot on DevelopmentDemoData endpoint, P5-10 adds read-only pilot checks, P5-11 adds controlled write pilot checks, P5-12 adds controlled execution pilot checks, P5-13 adds controlled report/artifact pilot checks, P5-14 adds controlled workflow read/history pilot checks, P5-15 adds a tenant-isolation integration matrix, P5-16A adds persisted Project ownership fields, P5-16B adds explicit tenant-aware query isolation services for Projects/Buildings, P5-16C integrates those services into protected Project/Building read controllers, and P5-16D integrates workflow/scenario/job protected read paths with workflow tenant-aware query service logic.
areas.risk: Dedicated artifact write/delete route protection, ownership backfill, metadata-incomplete workflow ownership paths, global query filters, database row-level security, and external identity provider integration remain staged protection risks.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-17/P6: harden workflow metadata ownership completeness and ownership backfill, then evaluate stricter persistence-layer isolation planning.

areas.currentStatus: Single API key settings model without per-principal scope model.
areas.risk: Shared API key blast radius and limited accountability.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-03: add principal-scoped key model and lifecycle controls.

areas.currentStatus: UnknownNeedsAudit: user domain entity not present in core runtime DbContexts.
areas.risk: No ownership/identity anchor for authorization and audit.

areas.currentStatus: UnknownNeedsAudit: no organization/tenant persistence model in current runtime DbContexts.
areas.risk: No first-class tenant boundary for SaaS isolation.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-01/P5-02: define organization and membership model.

areas.currentStatus: Projects have nullable OrganizationId and OwnerUserId transition fields; P5-16B adds explicit Project/Building tenant-scoped read services, P5-16C wires protected Project/Building read controllers, and P5-16D extends read-controller integration to workflow/scenario/job protected read/history paths using workflow/project metadata where available.
areas.risk: Legacy projects can remain unscoped until ownership backfill is completed; workflow metadata ownership coverage remains partial for some historical paths.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-17/P6: complete workflow metadata ownership readiness and ownership backfill planning.

areas.currentStatus: Project tenant identifiers are persisted as nullable transition fields; explicit Project/Building tenant-scoped read services are integrated in P5-16C and workflow/scenario/job protected read paths are integrated in P5-16D, but global tenant query filters and database row-level security are not enabled.
areas.risk: Potential cross-tenant data access remains in metadata-incomplete workflow query paths until ownership backfill, row-level/query-level enforcement, and external identity integration are implemented.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-17/P6: harden workflow metadata completeness and backfill; evaluate global filters only after that readiness is proven.

areas.currentStatus: Audit event contracts, in-memory append-only writer, metadata sanitizer, and audit registry foundation are implemented; durable storage is still pending.
areas.risk: In-memory provider is not durable and does not provide production retention guarantees.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-05B/P5-06: add durable audit persistence provider, retention policy, and controlled query surface.

areas.currentStatus: Global and heavy rate limits exist. P5-06 foundation adds principal-aware partitioning model (organization/user/API-key fingerprint/IP) plus endpoint-category policy registry with compatibility-disabled defaults.
areas.risk: Distributed rate limiting and production quota management are not implemented yet.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-next: add distributed limiter backend, plan quotas, and multi-node consistency controls.

areas.currentStatus: Development demo-data route is explicitly gated by development environment check.
areas.risk: Future development endpoints may be exposed if gating is omitted.
areas.recommendedAction: Keep and extend environment-gating guard tests.

areas.currentStatus: OpenAPI endpoint mapping is development-only in pipeline.
areas.risk: Operational misconfiguration can expose API metadata unexpectedly.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-03: define explicit production OpenAPI exposure rules.

areas.currentStatus: API key is configuration-driven; hardcoded key values are not present in tracked appsettings defaults.
areas.risk: Secret lifecycle and rotation controls are not yet formalized.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-03/P5-05: codify secret handling, rotation, and audit controls.

areas.currentStatus: Structured diagnostics policy exists with event taxonomy; security-focused audit log boundary is partial.
areas.risk: Security event analysis coverage is incomplete without principal/tenant context enrichment.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-05/P5-06: enrich principal metadata and audit events.

areas.currentStatus: Frontend auth-shell foundation is implemented with auth state/principal/organization models, protected content wrapper, and unauthorized/forbidden UX states. Default compatibility keeps local anonymous flows non-breaking.
areas.risk: Real login/provider integration and tenant-aware navigation are still pending.
areas.recommendedAction: P5-next: connect frontend auth shell to backend principal/auth endpoints and add provider/session lifecycle.

p5Roadmap.title: Identity domain skeleton
p5Roadmap.risk: Incorrect identity boundary can block later authorization rollout.

p5Roadmap.title: Project ownership and tenant scoping model
p5Roadmap.risk: Foundation contracts/policy exist, but route authorization and DB-level tenant enforcement remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: API authentication boundary
p5Roadmap.risk: Foundation is implemented; broad route-level authorization remains pending and must be rolled out safely.

p5Roadmap.title: Authorization policies
p5Roadmap.risk: Policy and rollout documentation exists, but broad route-level authorization enforcement is still staged.

p5Roadmap.title: Audit log
p5Roadmap.risk: Foundation is in place; durable persistence, retention controls, and privileged query access remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Rate limiting by principal
p5Roadmap.risk: Foundation is implemented; distributed quotas and production abuse controls remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Frontend auth shell
p5Roadmap.risk: Foundation is implemented; real provider login and tenant-aware route UX remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Security regression tests
p5Roadmap.risk: Governance guardrails are implemented; deeper tenant-isolation and production auth integration tests remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected endpoint pilot rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Pilot protection is limited to a low-risk endpoint group; broad route authorization rollout remains future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected read endpoints rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Read-only pilot is implemented for selected Projects/Buildings endpoints; write/execute endpoints remain unprotected in this stage.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected write endpoints rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Write pilot is implemented for selected Projects/Buildings endpoints; workflow/calculation/report/artifact protections remain future rollout stages.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected workflow/calculation execution rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Execution pilot is implemented for selected workflow/calculation endpoints; report generation, artifact operations, and tenant-boundary enforcement remain future rollout stages.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected report/artifact endpoints rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Report/artifact pilot is implemented for selected endpoints; workflow read/history endpoints and tenant-boundary enforcement remain future rollout stages.

p5Roadmap.title: Protected workflow read/history endpoints rollout
p5Roadmap.risk: Workflow read/history pilot is implemented for selected endpoints; dedicated artifact write/delete protection and tenant-boundary enforcement remain future rollout stages.

p5Roadmap.title: Tenant isolation integration matrix
p5Roadmap.risk: Cross-tenant matrix coverage is implemented for protected endpoint groups; DB row-level security, query isolation, ownership backfill, and external identity provider integration remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Persistence-backed tenant ownership fields
p5Roadmap.risk: Nullable Project ownership fields are implemented as a persistence foundation; global query filters, database row-level security, ownership backfill, and external identity provider integration remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Tenant-aware query isolation services
p5Roadmap.risk: Project/Building tenant-scoped read services are implemented as a foundation; controllers, global query filters, DB row-level security, ownership backfill, and workflow metadata query isolation remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Tenant-aware read controller integration
p5Roadmap.risk: Protected Project/Building read controllers now use tenant-aware query services behind rollout options; workflow query integration, ownership backfill, global query filters, DB row-level security, and external identity provider integration remain future work.

p5Roadmap.title: Workflow tenant-aware read integration
p5Roadmap.risk: Protected workflow/scenario/job read-history paths now use workflow tenant-aware query integration behind rollout options; metadata-incomplete paths, ownership backfill, global query filters, DB row-level security, and external identity provider integration remain future work.

nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No claim that API keys are complete user authentication.
No external identity provider integration claim.
